text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I saw a rare sight yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Pretty sure it was a hawk... Never<n>thought I'd see
such a big bird on<n>campus.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Maybe birds of prey find the city more<n>hospitable
nowadays.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Either way, I'd like to see that gallant<n>silhouette
again sometime.
